synopsis:
Star Wars Adventures #03 is the third issue of the Star Wars Adventures (2020) comic series. The comic is written by Michael Moreci and Sam Maggs, illustrated by Ray-Anthony Height and Davide Tinto.
Join the Wookiees of Kashyyyk for part one of a special Life Day celebration! Then, follow Kylo Ren as he learns what it means to be the Supreme Leader of the First Order
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020) #03 - Life Day
